description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push to the master branch. Run a Windows job that checks out the repository, sets up Python, and configures environment variables with date and version info. Install the XP Toolset, download dependencies, add msbuild to PATH, compile the source code for x86 and x64, pull translations and a data patch, copy data to the bin directory, translate the installer, create a nightly installer and ZIP files, generate build logs, and archive the artifacts.
